title: Tâi-gí Telex Ji̍p-huat
subtitle: Sú-iōng Telex hong-keh ji̍p ji̍t Tâi-oân Bân-lâm-gí (Tâi-lô pheng-im)

input.label: Chhì chhì khòaⁿ:
input.placeholder: Tī chia ji̍p... (pí-jû: tair → taî, taîf → taî-)

howItWorks.title: Tâi-gí Telex Ji̍p-hoat Só͘-bêng
howItWorks.description: Chit ê ji̍p-hoat sú-iōng Telex hong-keh ê khí-phiat lâi ji̍p ji̍t Tâi-oân Bân-lâm-gí (Tâi-lô pheng-im). Sian-tiâu hû-hō ē-sái hòng tī bó-im āu-bīn (hâng-lāi) a̍h-sī múi ê im-chat ê kiat-bóe.
